creator: thomas@gibfest.dk
text:
Hello :)

vlan(4) interfaces and bridge(4) interfaces are automagically added to an interfaces group when they are created, called "vlan" and "bridge" repectively.

I would just love it if the same were true for carp(4) interfaces. It would make scripting stuff much easier. Currently I am adding the group in my ansible roles but I see no reason why it shouldn't happen automatically.

Thanks!
